case_title: ANNIE WASHINGTON VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-23-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANNIE WASHINGTON. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY'S REPRESENTATIVE LAWRENCE TEAL. PARTIES STIPULATE TO JPT. COURT CALENDAR WAS TOO FULL TO HEAR THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANNIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 23, 2016 AT 1:30. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,375.00 FILED BY WASHINGTON, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASHINGTON, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY $840.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $840.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY WASHINGTON, ANNIE SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED OCT-11-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-26-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES LAWRENCE TEAL, NICOLE SANTIAGO & DIANE LITTS, LAW CLERK, AGENT & CLAIMS ADJUSTER, RESPECTIVELY FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY. PLAINTIFF ANNIE WASHINGTON IS NOT PRESENT, BUT HER REPRESENTATIVE, KATHY OSGOOD, INFORMED THE COURT THAT MS. WASHINGTON'S CAR BROKE DOWN LATE THIS MORNING IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND SHE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR AT THIS AFTERNOON'S HEARING. DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: PRO TEM: DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANNIE WASHINGTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC HOUSING AUTHORITY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY P. LAWRENCE TRAL, LAW CLERK. PLAINTIFF BAY CLEANING SOLUTIONS, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM JOHNSON, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
